description:
A versatile mind mapping tool for collaborative brainstorming.

EdrawMind is designed for creating fresh new visual innovations, integrating your bullet points to structure an overall mind map. It is convenient and helpful for you to use EdrawMind to sort out your thoughts or ideas in order to find solutions to problems.
All-New Hand-Drawn Mind Map Mode Is Now Live!
Say goodbye to cookie-cutter, rigid frameworks and rediscover the most natural, organic thinking envisioned by Tony Buzan, the founder of mind mapping!
We’re introducing the new mode "Hand-drawn", turning every idea capture into an artful, knowledge-rich creation.
(1) Entry Point: On the Home Page, click the Hand-Drawn Mode toggle in the lower-left corner to switch to Hand-Drawn Mode.
(2) Feature Details: You can switch back to "Professional" mode at any time. In Hand-drawn mode, the interface changes, and hand-drawn mind maps are saved in a new file format.
Hand-Drawn Mind Map Features
Break Free from Traditional Layouts and Capture the Authentic Pen-and-Paper Feel!
(1) Flexible Branches, Natural Flow: Freely adjust line positions and long-press the “+” button to draw out branches as naturally as sketching a mind map on paper.
(2) Text That Flows Naturally: Paired with exclusive hand-drawn fonts, text automatically follows the curves of branch lines for a more organic and visually engaging experience.
(3) Decorate Freely with Rich Visuals: Quickly insert local images and official illustrations to make your mind map more vivid.
Hand-Drawn Mind Map Illustration
Not Just Efficiency—Also Exceptional Visual Impact!
Built-In Premium Illustration Library Covering Various Styles (Colored Pencil, Watercolor, Pixel, 3D, etc.).
Smart Semantic Matching: Select any node, and the system accurately recognizes text semantics and instantly matches the most relevant illustration from the extensive library, bringing your mind map to life!
Quick Image Processing
Provides Lightweight Yet Advanced Process Image Capabilities, Handling All Image Processing in One Place!
(1) One-Click Background Remover: Easily remove image backgrounds, keep the main subject, and blend assets into hand-drawn mind maps—no more harsh white edges.
(2) Basic Image Processing: Crop, replace, flip, mirror, and other essential features are readily available.
AI Features for Hand-Drawn Mind Maps (Fully Free for a Limited Time During Open Beta)
Hand-Drawn Mode is currently in open beta; all related AI features are available for unlimited free use.
(1) AI-Powered Hand-Drawn Mind Maps (Highly Recommended!): Running out of inspiration? Just enter a sentence, and AI will instantly generate a visually rich, logically structured, and eye-catching hand-drawn mind map.
(2) AI Smart Color Palette: Intelligently analyzes overall content and context to tailor stunning color schemes for you and apply them with one click.
(3) AI Custom Illustration Generation: Can’t find the right asset? Enter a description, and AI will generate custom illustrations in multiple styles.
“AI Summarizer” Has a New Home
The “AI Summarizer” feature has moved to the left-side menu on the homepage under EdrawMind AI. Click the attachment button next to the input box to upload and parse files. Supports custom summarization instructions and follow-up conversations.
One-Click PowerPoint From Attachments. EdrawMind AI supports uploading PDFs, Word, Excel, images, and more; AI automatically extracts content and generates a complete PowerPoint. Research reports, meeting materials, and course documents can quickly turn into presentations.
AI Creation Homepage — Fully Redesigned
Refreshed homepage UI and AI creation entry points. Mind maps, slides, file summaries, and more have now been centralized — start creating from the moment you open the homepage.
New credit usage details and attachment upload guidance — supported formats, file size limits, and credit costs are now clearly displayed for a worry-free experience.
AI Chat history entries now support One-Click Copy and can be sent back to the input box for re-editing, making frequent prompt reuse easier.
